caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on Crypto-ML Ltd., a company that aims to capitalize on the 2017 crypto-craze. The presenter, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, gestures with his right hand while speaking. The slide behind him highlights the company's mission to "jump the hype-train" by developing a large-scale crypto-analysis platform. This platform involves heavy compute data analysis, transformation, and fetching, as well as deep running predictions using Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks. The presenter appears enthusiastic, possibly discussing the challenges and opportunities of surviving in the highly volatile cryptocurrency market. The event took place from July 23 to 29, 2018, and the timestamp indicates this particular segment was recorded on July 26 at 14:37:56.
